remarks: Welcome to Rolling Ridge!! This gorgeous 2-bedroom unit features two oversized bedrooms with ample closet space, an updated bathroom, galley kitchen with updated appliances, and a generous living room! Soak in the beautiful foliage and direct water views from your oversized balcony! Spend your Summers relaxing by the pool, enjoying the picnic space and tranquil on-site pond, or playing some paddle ball on the courts! Washer/dryer combo in-unit, and lots of guest parking available. Heat and Hot Water included in the rent, as well as an additional storage unit in the basement. Small pets considered on a case-by-case basis. Schedule your appointment today - this one won't last long!
